ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_name" TEXT /* Name of the match */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the match took place */,
  "code" TEXT /* Internal code for the match */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for the match details */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the match took place */,
  "indoor_outdoor" TEXT /* Indoor or outdoor match */,
  "surface" TEXT /* Surface type of the court */,
  "series_id" TEXT /* ID of the series the match belongs to */,
  "series_category_id" TEXT /* ID of the category within the series */,
  "start_dtm" INTEGER /* Start date and time of the match */,
  "finish_dtm" INTEGER /* Finish date and time of the match */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code where the match took place */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., 'Scheduled', 'In Progress', 'Completed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_series_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_category_id") REFERENCES series_categories ("series_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "surface" TEXT /* Surface type of the court */,
  "indoor_outdoor" TEXT /* Indoor or outdoor venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code where the venue is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "series_format" TEXT /* Format of the series (e.g., 'Round Robin', 'Knockout') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series_categories" (
  "series_category_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each category within a series */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_level" INTEGER /* Level of the category (e.g., 1 for top level, 2 for second level) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the country is located on */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country is located in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code the team represents */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "hand" TEXT /* Hand the player uses (e.g., 'Right', 'Left') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match result */,
  "match_id" TEXT /* ID of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the match */,
  "sets_won" INTEGER /* Number of sets won by the player/team */,
  "games_won" INTEGER /* Number of games won by the player/team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'admin', 'media', 'fan') */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)
